case_title: JOSEPH BRAVO VS. DEBBIE B. HONIG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $712.91 FILED BY BRAVO, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT HONIG, DEBBIE B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2009 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-26-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. ADDRESS OF PARTIES VERIFIED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-30-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED DEC-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HONIG, DEBBIE B.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY BRAVO, JOSEPH HONIG, DEBBIE B.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRAVO, JOSEPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HONIG, DEBBIE B. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
